comment: Love the new dashboard — finally a simple way to see all my runs at once.
suggested_response: We're so glad you're enjoying the new dashboard and find it simpler to view your runs!

comment: Logs are useful but scrolling through 500 lines to find one error is painful.
suggested_response: We understand that scrolling through long log files can be frustrating, and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

comment: The webhook trigger feature is great. Worked first try.
suggested_response: That's wonderful to hear that our webhook trigger feature worked perfectly for you on the first try!

comment: Billing is confusing. Got charged twice last month and support took 5 days to respond.
suggested_response: We're very sorry to hear about the billing issue and the delay in getting a response from our support team; we're actively working to improve these areas.

comment: When will there be a Python SDK? The HTTP API is fine but an SDK would be faster.
suggested_response: Thank you for your feedback; we understand the value of an SDK and we'll certainly consider it for future development.

comment: Great tool overall. No complaints yet.
suggested_response: We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying our tool so far!

comment: Archive button is in a weird spot and I've hit delete twice by accident.
suggested_response: We're sorry to hear you've accidentally deleted items due to the archive button's placement, and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

comment: Just wanted to say thanks — this replaced three cron jobs and saved my weekend.
suggested_response: We're thrilled to hear that our service saved your weekend and replaced multiple cron jobs – that's fantastic news!

comment: Docs could be more specific about how secrets interact with pipelines.
suggested_response: We appreciate your feedback regarding the clarity of our documentation on how secrets interact with pipelines, and we'll work to improve it.

comment: I really dislike the dark theme's contrast on small text. Please add a high-contrast option.
suggested_response: We understand your frustration with the dark theme's contrast on small text and appreciate your suggestion for a high-contrast option.
